data:
User-agent: *
Disallow:

##Block bad bots source: https://stackoverflow.com/questions/47112805/how-to-block-httrack-ex-programs
RewriteEngine On 
RewriteCond %{HTTP_USER_AGENT} ^BlackWidow [OR]

RewriteCond %{HTTP_USER_AGENT} ^SiteSnagger [OR]
RewriteCond %{HTTP_USER_AGENT} ^SmartDownload [OR]
